---
title: "Workshops"
toc: false
toc-location: left
preview: images/photo.jpg
lightbox: true
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

I organize workshops, webinars, and symposia that bring together researchers, policymakers, agency staff, and practitioners around applied questions in food markets, food policy, data infrastructure, and agricultural economics.

These events reflect my broader interest in building research communities, improving access to data and evidence, and creating spaces where applied economists can connect around shared policy and methodological questions.

# Workshops, webinars, and organized symposia

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## Industrial Organization in Agricultural Economics: Trends and Frontiers

**October 2025**  
Virtual  
Sponsored by the Council on Food, Agricultural, and Resource Economics

[Visit event page](https://www.cfare.org/items/industrialorganization){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## Envisioning Food and Agricultural Data for the Future: Engaging Communities to Identify Trusted Data

**June 2025**  
Virtual  
Sponsored by the Council on Food, Agricultural, and Resource Economics

[Visit event page](https://www.cfare.org/items/foodandagdata){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## Workshop on Food Prices and Forecasting

**July 2024**  
New Orleans, Louisiana  
Sponsored by the USDA Economic Research Service and the Agricultural & Applied Economics Association

[Visit workshop page](https://laurenchenarides.github.io/usda_food_prices_workshop/){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## Enhancing Data Discovery with DemocratizingData.ai

**June 2024**  
Virtual  
Sponsored by the USDA Economic Research Service and the USDA National Agricultural Statistics Service

[Visit workshop site](https://usda-data-usage-workshop.netlify.app/){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## Shifting to Plant-Based Proteins: Changes in Food Production Technologies and Their Consequences on Food Markets

**August 2023**  
Rennes, France  
European Association of Agricultural Economics Congress

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## Evidence-Based Policymaking for Applied Economists

**October 2022**  
Virtual  
Sponsored by the Agricultural & Applied Economics Association, USDA Economic Research Service, and USDA-AFRI-NIFA

[Watch playlist](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLO6mH44DX6CLmmz-Elb1ZgJsBgFJ89Y2H){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## The Meatless Revolution: A Conversation with Industry Experts

**April 2022**  
Virtual  
Sponsored by the Agricultural & Applied Economics Association

[Watch webinar](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3U9U9NThqAM){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

:::

# Related initiatives

Several of these events are connected to broader projects on data democratization, evidence-based policymaking, food prices, and food market structure.

[Learn more about my research](research.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
